FORBIDDEN_REMOVE_MEMBER: Only the group creator can remove members
FORBIDDEN_MANAGE_CATEGORIES: Only the group creator can manage group categories
GROUP_CATEGORY_NOT_FOUND: Group category with id {id} not found
DUPLICATE_PERSONAL_CATEGORY_IN_CONNECT: Each personal category can only be linked to one group category in this group
GROUP_CATEGORY_NOT_IN_GROUP: Group category does not belong to this group
PERSONAL_CATEGORY_NOT_OWNED: Personal category does not belong to the user
